results.term: I don't like being blamed for something when I don...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I don't like being blamed for something when I don't feel I did anything wrong.  A neighbor's dog attacked my dog and another dog within a week and I reported it to our apartment manager and animal control.  She was given the choice to get rid of her dog or move and she decided to move.  But my neighbors are mad at me, because they think I overreacted.  I guess they liked her more.

results.term: Thank you!  That makes me feel better!  But, I don...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Thank you!  That makes me feel better!  But, I don't know how to make my neighbors feel that way and I hate being the outcast.

results.term: I totally agree with you!  The woman is disabled a...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I totally agree with you!  The woman is disabled and I think most of the neighbors feel sorry for her.  I've seen her loose control of the dog before, but she never attacked another dog(s).  I've even seem the dog pull her scooter over and the woman needed lots of help to get back into it.  I think everyone feels sorry for her.

results.term: I've talked to the neighbors face-to-face and they...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I've talked to the neighbors face-to-face and they just think that I overreacted.  The woman started getting her dog and private training and so they feel that she was trying.  My point was that my dog weighs 15 pounds and her dog weighs 45 pounds and, if it happens again, I may not have a dog anymore.  I don't want to wait until a dog is killed or badly injured.  I told them exactly what you just said, but they are being mean!

turn_info.content: I guess I could try talking to them again.  Maybe they've cooled off some.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Thank you so much!  Those are really good suggestions.  I'll do that and, hopefully, they will calm down.  If not, I have other friends that live outside my neighborhood.  And I can talk to the manager like you said.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I appreciate your help today.  And your validation that I did nothing wrong.  I was beginning to second guess my actions.
